title: Mini Spatula Silicone Spatula Set - Cuttte 2pcs Makeup Spatula Small Spatula for Cosmetics, Reusable Beauty Tiny Spatula, Thin Jar Spatula Food Scraper, Get Last of Makeup Out, Black and Red
description:
About this item
What you will get. Come with one 9.2 inch length red makeup spatula and one 6 inch length black mini spatula for cosmetics. Double-ended design, one side is mini spoon and the other side is silicone scraper
Sturdy and reliable. These small spatula for makeup are made of food grade silicone and there is a metal rod inside to provide support. Easy to clean. A little soap and water leaves these silicone spatula set looking brand new
Great cosmetic spatulas to prevent waste. Their small size with different lengths allows you access to bottles and jars of all sizes and shapes leading to a lot less wasted products
No more dirt! These lotion spatulas help keep the product in the jar untouched. A must have to keep dirt out of your make-up
Great makeup spatula! Worked perfectly to get the last of product out of any bottle, such as lotions, foundation, moisturizer, hair products, face creams and tubes of medicine
reviews_5s: I love these little spatulas. I use these regularly to clear out skin care products and I love that they have different sizes. The long red spatula is almost as tall as a Nivea 16.9oz lotion bottle. I was able to scoop out & fill up a .84 fl oz container of a previous hair product and Im so impressed! I didnt think I had that much left over. I cut the bottle in half to make the process easier, but you would be able to get product out without cutting the bottle. It puts into perspective how many bottles I’ve thrown out with product in it before having these spatulas. They are super sturdy and easy to wash, and flexible at the tips for scooping. They are good quality. Great value for money and functionality is great. Definitely worth having these to get every ounce of product you pay for!Super sturdy with the metal (or whatever stiff material they used inside) inside. I use to get the lotion or other skin care products out of long containers that you can’t reach or get out with the pump. I love the different end options as well. I even used it the other day for Vicks vapor rub, so I didn’t have to stick my finger in the container, and get Vicks underneath my fingernail. May sound like a silly little thing, and I wouldn’t buy it for that purpose, but what I’m saying is, it’s handy for several things. I might buy another set to keep in the kitchen. Definite value for the money! Very pleased.I haven't had them very long, but They work great. I like the two different sizes.This works very well getting makeup or moisturizer out of the jar without getting it under fingernails.These are wonderful for getting the last little bit of foundation out of the tiny jar. No waste. They are sturdy and have just the right amount of flexibility to get the job done.I don’t know how I lived this long without this product!!! The spatulas do a great job reaching the bottom of containers. Very sturdy and well worth the price!I use these spoons & scrapers to get the last of things in jars, or tubes. I particularly like them for face creams & makeup. I find a lot of uses for these!Whoever invented these was a genius! I give credit where credit is due. No more wasted lotion at the bottom of the container! Love, love, love these.Didn’t realized how much is left in the bottom of bottles that we can‘t get at!! Purchased twice~~ once as a gift’nThese are good quality and variety of types to use in jars, tubes ( cut the bottom off that tube of cosmetics or food) and dip away. It’s really shocking that so much is still in there after you thought it was empty.
reviews_1s: I really wanted to love these, but they are flimsy and you can see the metal rod through the red spatula. Red spatula also arrived with a crack in the silicone.not what I expected.I got it as a cheap 710 alternative it's way to bendy to do anything worthwhile skip this oneI purchased it to get few last drops out of my makeup bottles. Its way way to big and cant fit in any of the foundation bottles let alone my lipcolor.Way to big to fit into a lipglossBlack ink was all ver the products and inside of bag. Returned unopenedI returned the item due to poor quality 😔
